headline: How The Colgate Palmolive (CL) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And 2030 Plan
summary: Colgate-Palmolive’s modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly from US$97.26 to US$96.68 per share, a change of about US$0.58 that keeps the overall valuation view broadly intact while acknowledging updated inputs. That small adjustment sits against mixed Street commentary, where some analysts highlight the long term 2030 plan and others flag cost and valuation risks that have led to price targets moving both higher and lower. Read on to see how these shifting targets, recent news, and new...

headline: Bank of America sends frank message on next Fed rate cut
summary: The market has been drifting toward a more hawkish view of the Federal Reserve. Bank of America is pushing back. BofA is maintaining its forecast for two Fed rate cuts in 2026, telling clients the central bank will ultimately look past supply-driven inflation, weak wage pressure, and political ...

headline: 'Not as bullish': Big banks are entering Q1 earnings season on less certain footing than in January
summary: Wall Street's biggest banks are riding into the first quarter earnings season on far less certain ground than where they began 2026.

headline: Global Funds Flee Indian Stocks at Record Pace on Growth Fears
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Global funds are dumping Indian equities at a record clip as an energy shock from the US-Iran war threatens to derail the outlook of the world’s fastest-growing major economy.In just over three months, they have pulled $18.84 billion from local shares, edging past the full-year record outflow of $18.79 billion seen in 2025, according Central Depository Services India Ltd. headline: How The Bank Of America (BAC) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: Bank of America is back in focus as the modeled fair value in a recent update shifted from US$61.77 to US$60.42, a trim of around 2% that frames how some analysts are recalibrating expectations. This move sits alongside a split in recent Street research, with some firms cutting price targets while others lift them or start coverage with more constructive calls, giving you mixed signals on earnings power and execution risk. As you read on, you will see how to track these changing views and...
